context.audience: ML engineers customizing foundation models for domain-specific tasks, developers who need better quality than prompt engineering alone, startups building proprietary AI capabilities on top of open models
pain_points: Preparing and formatting high-quality training datasets from existing data
Choosing between fine-tuning, RAG, and prompt engineering for a specific use case
Evaluating fine-tuned model quality and detecting regressions
Managing fine-tuning costs across providers and open-source alternatives
Deploying and serving fine-tuned models efficiently in production
